capabilities.test: traces LLM requests/responses with latency, tokens, inputs/outputs
detects and blocks prompt injection / jailbreak attempts before LLM call
detects and redacts PII (email, SSN, phone, card) from model outputs
evaluates faithfulness, relevance, hallucination for RAG responses
creates/versions test datasets from production traces or golden examples
captures user thumbs-up/down and pushes scores back to observability system
evaluates golden dataset and exits non-zero on quality regression
fully deployable on-prem via Docker Compose or Kubernetes without cloud SaaS
background worker evaluates new traces automatically without manual trigger
uses ML model (not just regex) for semantic injection/jailbreak detection
regression gate is invokable from CI pipeline with documented exit codes
detects toxicity, hate speech, or harmful language in inputs or outputs
validates structured/JSON output against a schema before returning to caller
synthetically generates test Q&A pairs from documents without manual labeling
visual UI to edit prompts, compare model outputs, and replay traces
guardrails apply to streaming (token-by-token) responses, not just batch
